title: astragalus pseudomurinus
intro: Astragalus pseudomurinus, also known as Chinese astragalus or Huangqi, is a type of flowering plant in the legume family. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for centuries due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and immunomodulatory effects. The health benefits of Astragalus pseudomurinus include reducing fatigue, improving cardiovascular health, and enhancing immune function. In herbal preparations, it is often used as a tea, capsule, or tincture, and is commonly combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
intro_study: According to "Zhongguo Zhong yao za zhi = Zhongguo zhongyao zazhi = China journal of Chinese materia medica", astragalus pseudomurinus, which is likely referring to the total flavonoids of Astragalus (TFA), has been found to have an antimutagenesis effect, specifically reducing cyclophosphamide-induced micronucleus number and gene mutagenesis of V79/HGPRT.
